narrative:
DRIVER
NZD leads H4 CSM at 100 with AUD second at 88, both accelerating hard against D1 readings (NZD 100vs40, AUD 88vs66), flagged as the most critical short-term signal, as US-Iran ceasefire hopes collapse DXY to 99.00 and S&P futures lift 0.4% alongside copper gains. AUDJPY H4 Strong Buy with AUDUSD correlation at 0.90 makes the AUD-JPY cluster the cleanest expression, while NZDUSD and NZDJPY both print H4 Strong Buy with NZDUSD-NZDJPY correlation at 0.89 amplifying the move. CHF fading on H4 CSM (77vs100 D1) means USDCHF H4 Strong Sell is a live counter read but do not hold it against the broader risk-on tape.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: AUDJPY CMP 57 with H4 rising sharply, AUDUSD CMP 48 with H4 61 accelerating versus D1 fade
Fading: EURUSD CMP 41 with D1 momentum 25 collapsing, GBPUSD CMP 44 with D1 at 24 deteriorating

WATCH
Any formal US-Iran ceasefire confirmation hits USDCAD directly, CAD CSM accelerating 44vs21 triggers a sell USDCAD breakout below current range.
USDJPY D1 momentum 86 rising while H4 fades to 41, a H4 bounce rejection near resistance confirms D1 buy resumption on USDJPY.
Copper sustaining above 6.38 extends the AUDUSD H4 Strong Buy signal toward next resistance as the commodity-currency link holds firm.

themes.theme: US-Iran geopolitical tensions easing with ceasefire and peace deal hopes
Risk-on sentiment from geopolitical optimism supporting equities and commodity currencies
Safe-haven flows mixed as USD weakness offset by energy cost pressures
Gold rally on US-Iran peace hopes and USD weakness pressuring oil
USD Index weakness around 99.00 driven by geopolitical de-escalation
Asian currencies showing divergent performance with AI tailwinds vs geopolitical drag
GBP strength on EUR rally momentum testing resistance levels
Israel-Lebanon re-escalation risk creating offsetting geopolitical uncertainty

key_observation: Primary narrative is US-Iran peace deal optimism crushing USD and supporting risk assets and commodities. However, conflicting reports on Iran uranium demands and Israel-Lebanon tensions create offset. EUR leading strength on geopolitical relief. Equity markets rallying on peace hopes and tech strength. Headline quality degrades significantly after 15:56 with non-FX stock tips appearing.
watch: US Consumer Confidence data release timing critical as immediate catalyst. Monitor real-time Iran deal negotiations and Israel-Lebanon developments. USD support at 99.00 key technical level. Gold 4500 support scrutiny. CNY 6.7820 support watch. BoK hawkish signals for KRW volatility.
